title: Ubiquitous-language evidence
description: Evidence produced by the ubiquitous-language leg: a manifest of the domain glossary produced by the domain-modeling skill (`/domain-modeling` → CONTEXT.md), plus the GitHub run id whose `mm-tree-ubiquitous-language` artifact holds the file.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id of the leg run; the combine hook downloads its `mm-tree-ubiquitous-language` artifact.

files.description: Manifest of files uploaded in the mm-tree artifact (paths relative to the tree root).
